subcodes.first_line: The Book of Ha hath been sent down from the presence of the Glory unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهاء نزل من لدی البهاء الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم قد اصبحنا
